tasks.name: Create TypeScript types for dashboard progress loader

action.target: TypeScript interfaces for course progress and survey response data

tasks.purpose: Define type-safe interfaces for loader return types to enable type checking and autocomplete

constraints: Must use generated database types as foundation
Must export all interfaces for use in loader and page components

tasks.input_state: Database has course_progress and survey_responses tables with generated TypeScript types available in database.types.ts
tasks.output_state: TypeScript interfaces defined at apps/web/app/home/(user)/_lib/types/dashboard-progress.types.ts exporting CourseProgressData, SurveyAssessmentData, and DashboardProgressData
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Types file exists and exports CourseProgressData, SurveyAssessmentData, and DashboardProgressData interfaces with proper database type references

tasks.name: Create dashboard progress loader with parallel data fetching

action.target: Server-side loader function with Promise.all() for parallel fetching

tasks.purpose: Implement data loader that fetches course progress and survey responses in parallel using RLS-protected queries

constraints: Must use cache() wrapper for request deduplication
Must use Promise.all() for parallel fetching
Must use RLS-protected queries (no admin client)
Queries must filter by authenticated user (auth.uid())

tasks.input_state: TypeScript types exist (T1 complete), database tables have RLS policies enabled, Supabase client functions available
tasks.output_state: Loader function loadDashboardProgressData() exists at apps/web/app/home/(user)/_lib/server/dashboard-progress.loader.ts, fetches course_progress and survey_responses.category_scores in parallel
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Loader function successfully fetches course progress (completion_percentage, current_lesson_id) and survey category_scores for authenticated user using two parallel RLS-protected queries
tasks.verification_command: pnpm typecheck && pnpm --filter web build && grep -E '(Promise\.all|cache|server-only)' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/server/dashboard-progress.loader.ts

tasks.name: Integrate loader with dashboard page component

action.target: Dashboard page component to call loader and receive data

tasks.purpose: Wire the loader function into the dashboard page to make progress data available for future widgets

constraints: Must await params in Next.js 15 style
Must call loader with authenticated user ID
Data can be passed to PageBody as props for future use

tasks.input_state: Loader function exists and is functional (T2 complete), page component exists with empty PageBody
tasks.output_state: Dashboard page calls loadDashboardProgressData() and has access to progress and assessment data
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Page component successfully loads data on server-side without errors, data is available in scope (even if not yet displayed)
tasks.verification_command: pnpm dev && sleep 3 && curl -s http://localhost:3000/home -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' | grep -q 200 && echo 'Page loads successfully'
